properties.serializedData:
[concat('{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# FinOps Budget Compliance Dashboard
> Real-time view of all resource group budgets, amortized spend, and compliance status from the FinOps Inventory (Cosmos DB)

---"},"name":"title"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## How to Use
1. Open this workbook in the Azure Portal
2. Data comes from the FinOps Inventory Engine (Azure Function + Cosmos DB)
3. Refresh to see latest evaluation results

### API Endpoints (for Power BI or custom integrations)
- **Full Inventory:** `', parameters('inventoryApiUrl'), '`
- **Finance vs Technical Variance:** `', parameters('varianceApiUrl'), '`

---"},"name":"instructions"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Quick Links
- [Cost Management Budgets](https://portal.azure.com/#view/Microsoft_Azure_CostManagement/Menu/~/budgets) - Native budgets
- [Policy Compliance](https://portal.azure.com/#view/Microsoft_Azure_Policy/PolicyMenuBlade/~/Compliance) - RGs without budgets"},"name":"links"}],"isLocked":false}')]
